diagrams.title: Hamiltonian Cycle in K₅
diagrams.description: Complete graph K₅ showing one Hamiltonian cycle (1-2-3-4-5-1) visiting all vertices exactly once
elements: Highlighted cycle edges forming the Hamiltonian circuit
diagrams.purpose: Visualize complete graph and Hamiltonian cycle pattern

diagrams.title: Dirac's Theorem Condition
diagrams.description: Graph showing minimum degree requirement δ ≥ n/2 for Hamiltonian property

diagrams.title: Backtracking Algorithm Tree
diagrams.description: Decision tree showing backtracking approach for finding Hamiltonian path
diagrams.purpose: Visualize exponential search space of Hamiltonian problem

diagrams.title: Hamiltonian vs Eulerian Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing Eulerian path (all edges once) vs Hamiltonian path (all vertices once)
elements: Eulerian trail highlighted in one color
Labels showing edge vs vertex coverage
diagrams.purpose: Clarify fundamental difference between the two problems
